## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore (no behaviour change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build` locally and they passed
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] I added a changeset (`bun run changeset`) — required for any user-visible change to `@astlide/core` or `create-astlide`
- [ ] I updated TSDoc / README where the public API changed

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewers should look at first, design decisions to call out, screenshots, etc. -->
